evidence.observation: Fixture parcel screening: Brunswick County parcel intersection — municipal-vs-county zoning jurisdiction stress case. AOI intersects 1 parcel near incorporated boundary.

observed_value.source_note: Fixture parcel data for Brunswick County jurisdiction stress case. Zoning from Brunswick County GIS parcel layer; municipal ETJ boundary may differ.

evidence.caveat: Fixture-only parcel data for Brunswick County. Parcel boundaries are approximate; not survey-grade. Ownership, easements, and recorded instruments require confirmation by the Brunswick County Register of Deeds and a licensed surveyor. Acreage and zoning classification are indicative only; verify land use with Brunswick County Planning. ETJ boundaries may place this parcel under municipal jurisdiction.
